menu.invalid_choice: Invalid choice. Please enter a number from {choices}
menu.error_occurred: An error occurred: {error}. Please try again
menu.admin_required: Administrator privileges required for the frozen executable build.
menu.admin_required_continue: Continuing without Admin — some registry operations may fail.

mimo_login.title: MiMo Platform Login
mimo_login.no_url: OAuth URL not found in CLI output (exit {code})
mimo_login.fallback_hint: Try option 2 (paste API key) or run mimo providers login manually
mimo_login.paste_url: Paste OAuth URL manually (Enter to cancel):
mimo_login.opening_browser: Opening OAuth URL in Chrome profile {profile}...
mimo_login.browser_failed: Could not open Chrome — paste URL into your profile manually
mimo_login.timeout: Login timed out — auth.json not updated

dashboard.hint_login: Menu 5 = Platform login · Menu 6 = manage slots
dashboard.help_menu7: 7 = Deep reset — wipe slots + .config/mimocode + local data

config.config_force_update_disabled: Config file force update disabled — keeping existing config
config.config_force_update_enabled: Config file force update enabled — creating fresh config
config.config_removed: Config file removed for forced update

updater.updating: Updating to the latest version. The program will restart automatically.
updater.up_to_date: You are using the latest version.
updater.update_confirm: Do you want to update to the latest version? (Y/n)

mimo_total.title: Totally Reset MiMo CLI
mimo_total.warning: Deletes mimocode.db, memory, sessions, and auth. Restore only from backup.
mimo_total.slot_backup: Pro auth backed up to slot {id}
mimo_total.partial: Some paths are locked (close MiMo and retry or delete manually):
mimo_total.done: Totally reset complete ({count} items removed). Run mimo/start.bat again.

mimo_deep.title: Deep Reset MiMo CLI
mimo_deep.warning: Deletes ALL slots, .config/mimocode, DB, memory, sessions, and auth. Restore only from backup.
mimo_deep.confirm: Type YES to confirm deep reset:
mimo_deep.done: Deep reset complete ({count} items removed). Re-login via menu 5.

mimo_reset.title: Reset MiMo Machine ID
mimo_reset.auth_cleared: Removed auth.json for fresh anonymous session
mimo_reset.auth_slot_backup: Backed up Pro auth to slot: {id}
mimo_reset.slots_kept: Saved accounts remain in accounts/ — use menu 6 to activate
mimo_reset.admin_required: Need Administrator for registry. Re-run start.bat as Admin.
mimo_reset.partial_ok: MiMo local IDs updated; registry skipped.
mimo_reset.bootstrap_ok: MiMo Auto bootstrap OK (anonymous channel ready)
mimo_reset.next_auto: Press Tab → switch to MiMo Auto (free, no API key)
mimo_reset.next_pro: MiMo-V2.5-Pro needs Xiaomi API key → run: mimo providers login
mimo_reset.401_hint: 401 Invalid API Key = using Pro model without auth.json after reset

oauth.no_compatible_browser_found: No compatible browser found. Please install Google Chrome or Chromium.

chrome_profile.title: Chrome Profile Selection
chrome_profile.select_profile: Select a Chrome profile to use:
chrome_profile.warning_chrome_close: Warning: this will close all running Chrome processes
chrome_profile.oauth_close_chrome: Closing Chrome for OAuth login (required for profile launch)...
